code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let n = string.len(line)
    mut i = 0
    mut is_pal = true
    while i < n / 2
      let a = string.byte_at(line, i)
      let b = string.byte_at(line, n - 1 - i)
      match a
      when Some(av)
        match b
        when Some(bv)
          if av != bv
            is_pal = false
          end
        when None
          is_pal = false
        end
      when None
        is_pal = false
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if is_pal
      print("YES")
    else
      print("NO")
    end
  when None
    print("NO")
  end
end
